accepted_scope: The prior P15 SDK failure is accepted as a 5000 ms timeout-budget fault. The unchanged package-export assertions passed in 13.54 seconds under a command-local 60000 ms timeout; the remaining 55 SDK tests and both skipped typechecks passed once. Together with the independently accepted P15 performance evidence, the exact scratch candidate is authorized for product progression.
claim_boundary: This accepts timeout classification, the candidate semantic matrix, and exact-candidate progression. It does not accept the 47-row benchmark, final release gates, PR readiness, merge, or release.
